apply: Perform and demonstrate different yoga postures and breathing techniques
Apply yoga principles to improve flexibility, balance, and strength
Design a yoga routine for stress relief and relaxation
analyze: Analyze the impact of yoga on physical and mental health
Compare and contrast different yoga styles and their benefits
Evaluate the effectiveness of yoga in improving overall well-being
remember: Recall the different types of yoga postures and their benefits
Identify the various yoga breathing techniques and their effects
Name the different yoga practices for stress relief and relaxation
understand: Explain the concept of yoga as a holistic practice for physical, mental, and spiritual well-being
Describe the importance of proper alignment and breathing in yoga postures
Understand the role of yoga in improving flexibility, balance, and strength

ncert_objectives: To understand the concept of yoga and its benefits
To learn and perform various yoga postures and breathing techniques
To develop an understanding of yoga as a holistic practice for physical, mental, and spiritual well-being
board_exam_objectives: Explain the concept of yoga and its importance in everyday life
Describe the different types of yoga postures and their benefits
Perform and demonstrate a set of yoga postures and breathing techniques
